zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前BNB/美元价格运行于655附近，略低于20日均线659.81，短线呈现震荡偏弱整理结构，市场多空力量暂时平衡但略偏空头主导，成交动能不足。

MACD指标当前为-0.31附近，空头动能占优且未出现明显底背离，短期反弹力度有限。RSI缺失但结合价格结构判断，动能整体偏弱。

下方支撑集中在653.5附近及650整数关口，上方阻力位于659-662区间，对应20日均线与前高压力，突破需放量确认。

交易策略上建议以区间思路为主，未有效站稳660之前偏谨慎，激进者可在650-653分批低吸，跌破650则需止损观望，等待趋势明朗。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is currently in a short-term corrective phase following a mild rejection near the 660.3 area. Price action has drifted slightly below the 20-day SMA, suggesting weakening bullish momentum. The market is transitioning into a consolidation range rather than a strong directional trend, with volatility compressed between recent intraday highs and lows. Overall structure remains neutral-to-bearish in the near term unless price reclaims overhead resistance convincingly.

Momentum indicators reinforce this cautious outlook. The MACD reading is negative at -0.3096, indicating bearish momentum is still dominant, while the absence of a clear signal line data limits confirmation strength. With price trading beneath the 20-day SMA at 659.81, sellers maintain short-term control. Without RSI data, momentum bias is inferred from price behavior, which suggests neutral-to-weak conditions rather than oversold extremes.

Immediate support is found at the session low of 653.45, which represents the first critical defense zone. A break below this level could expose the 650 psychological area, followed by deeper liquidity near 645. On the upside, resistance aligns at 659.81, the 20-day SMA, and stronger resistance sits at 660.3, the recent high. A decisive breakout above this band would be required to re-establish bullish structure.

Trading strategy favors range-bound tactics until a breakout confirms direction. Traders may consider buying near 653–650 support with tight stops below 648, targeting rebound to 659–660 resistance. Alternatively, break and close above 660.3 could signal renewed bullish momentum and open upside continuation setups. Caution is warranted as indicators suggest limited trend strength and potential choppy price behavior in the near term.
